# K-Aqua - News

![](https://www.k-aqua.de/Pics/news_dakks_logo.jpg)

## We are ISO certified

Starting from October 2025 we have expanded our ISO management system as follows:

[English Version](https://www.k-aqua.de/PDF/KWT%20Zertifikate%20English.pdf) or [German Version](https://www.k-aqua.de/PDF/KWT%20Zertifikat%20Deutsch.pdf)

- ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
- ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System
- ISO 50001:2018 Energy Management System

json.company_description: Starting from October 2025, K-Aqua has expanded its ISO management system to include ISO 9001:2015 for Quality Management, ISO 14001:2015 for Environmental Management, and ISO 50001:2018 for Energy Management.

html:
K-Aqua - News

We are ISO certified

Starting from October 2025 we have expanded our ISO management system as follows: English Version  or German Version 

  • ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
  • ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System
  • ISO 50001:2018 Energy Management System
